practice-home.changeNote: Named reusable runs appear on Home with Add Run and edit entry points.

practice-home-edit.changeNote: Edit mode exposes drag-and-drop ordering, ELO-only editing, and removal controls for every run.

practice-custom-setup.changeNote: Custom Sprint setup becomes New Run and saves to Home without starting.

practice-run-name-validation.changeNote: Custom run names are required and unique with inline errors.

practice-run-standard-editor.changeNote: Built-in Run editing is limited to Current ELO and moves those controls out of Settings.

practice-custom-rating-editor.changeNote: Existing Custom Runs can update only Current ELO; creation settings remain fixed.

practice-run-remove-confirmation.changeNote: Removal expands an inline warning directly below the selected Run and retains ELO and history.

practice-runs-empty.changeNote: An empty Home exposes both Add Run and retained-run restore paths.

settings-advanced-ratings.changeNote: Settings no longer owns ELO controls; each run editor owns its current ELO.
